title: centaurea intercedens
intro: Centaurea intercedens, also known as the prickly centaury or centaury, is a plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, due to its rich content of bioactive compounds like flavonoids and iridoids. Centaurea intercedens can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
